reviews.comment:
La verdad puse una xq no habia 0...pesima atencion dicen q esta abierto las 24hs llegamos y nos cerraron la puerta en la cara se pusieron a limpiar nunca nos atendieron estuvimos 30 min esperando a q abran y nada...una verguenza nunca mas paramos ahi....mal educados y poco considerados con los turistas

(Translated by Google)
The truth is I put one because there wasn't 0... terrible service. They say it's open 24 hours. We arrived and they closed the door in our faces. They started cleaning. They never attended to us. We waited 30 minutes for them to open and nothing... a disgrace. We will never stop there again.... rude and inconsiderate with tourists.
